---
title: "Compare KD fits across different concentration pairs"
author: "Clemens Hug"
date: "02/20/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(synExtra)
library(here)
library(fst)
library(data.table)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(powerjoin)
library(reticulate)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)

z <- import("zarr")
b <- import_builtins()

theme_set(theme_minimal())

synapser::synLogin()
syn <- synDownloader("~/data", .cache = TRUE)
```

```{r}
kd_fit_pairs <- syn("syn73759909") |>
  read_csv() |>
  mutate(
    combination_print = str_replace(
      combination, fixed("_"), " nM + "
    ) |>
      paste0(" nM")
  )

kd_fits <- syn("syn69680641") |>
  read_csv()

chembl_kd_raw <- syn("syn52854574") |>
  read_csv()

compound_mapping <- syn("syn26260389") |>
  read_fst(as.data.table = TRUE)

kinomescan_kinase_info <- syn("syn51286743") |>
  read_csv()

single_dose <- syn("syn52504516") |>
  read_csv() |>
  filter(
    library == "OKL",
    dataset == "original_repeat_replaced"
  )

kd_pair_posterior_z <- z$open(
  z$storage$ZipStore(here("data", "all_pairs_posteriors.zarr.zip"), mode = "r")
)

kd_all_posterior_z <- z$open(
  z$storage$ZipStore(here("data", "all_eligible_posteriors.zarr.zip"), mode = "r")
)

hmsl_id_name_map <- distinct(
  single_dose,
  hmsl_id, name
) |>
  with(set_names(name, hmsl_id))
```


```{r}
chembl_kd <- chembl_kd_raw |>
  mutate(across(standard_value, as.numeric)) |>
  filter(
    standard_relation == "=" |
      (standard_relation %in% c(">=", ">") & standard_value > 9000)
  ) |>
  power_inner_join(
    compound_mapping |>
      filter(source == "chembl") |>
      distinct(lspci_id, chembl_id_compound = external_id),
    by = "chembl_id_compound",
    check = check_specs(
      duplicate_keys_right = "warn",
      unmatched_keys_left = "warn"
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(gene_symbol, lspci_id) |>
  summarize(
    chembl_kd = quantile(standard_value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
    chembl_kd_relation = paste(sort(unique(standard_relation)), collapse = ""),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  power_inner_join(
    kinomescan_kinase_info |>
      distinct(hgnc_symbol, `DiscoveRx Gene Symbol`),
    by = c("gene_symbol" = "hgnc_symbol"),
    check = check_specs(
      duplicate_keys_right = "ignore",
      unmatched_keys_left = "warn"
    )
  )
```


```{r}
kd_comparison <- power_inner_join(
  kd_fits,
  kd_fit_pairs |>
    select(hmsl_id, `DiscoveRx Gene Symbol`, combination, combination_print, starts_with("kd"), hill_slope, rhat),
  by = c("hmsl_id", "DiscoveRx Gene Symbol"),
  check = check_specs(
    duplicate_keys_left = "warn",
    unmatched_keys_left = "warn",
    unmatched_keys_right = "warn"
  ),
  suffix = c("_all", "_pairs")
) |>
  power_left_join(
    chembl_kd |>
      select(-gene_symbol),
    by = c("lspci_id", "DiscoveRx Gene Symbol"),
    check = check_specs(
      duplicate_keys_right = "warn"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(
      starts_with("kd_log"),
      \(x) pmin(x, log10(10000))
    ),
    across(
      c("kd_all", "kd_pairs"),
      \(x) pmin(x, 10000)
    ),
    kd_log_diff_all = kd_log_pairs - kd_log_all,
    kd_log_diff_chembl = kd_log_all - log10(chembl_kd * 1e-9)
  )

```


```{r}
p <- ggplot(
  kd_comparison,
  aes(
    kd_log_diff_all,
    combination_print
  )
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_violin() +
  facet_wrap(
    ~tas_kd,
    axes = "all", axis.labels = "margins"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Difference log10(Kd) two doses - all doses",
    y = "Concentration pair"
  ) +
  envalysis::theme_publish()
p

ggsave(
  here("plots", "kd_log_diff_all_violin.pdf"),
  p, width = 8, height = 6
)

p <- ggplot(
  kd_comparison,
  aes(
    kd_log_diff_chembl,
    combination
  )
) +
  geom_violin() +
  facet_wrap(
    ~tas_kd
  )
p
```



```{r}
kd_comparison |>
  group_by(combination, tas_kd) |>
  summarize(
    mean_square_diff_all = mean(kd_log_diff_all^2, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_square_diff_chembl = mean(kd_log_diff_chembl^2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(tas_kd, mean_square_diff_all) |>
  View()

pair_combinations_overall_mse <- kd_comparison |>
  power_inner_join(
    kd_comparison |>
      count(combination, tas_kd) |>
      group_by(combination) |>
      mutate(
        prop = n / sum(n)
      ) |>
      ungroup(),
    by = c("combination", "tas_kd"),
    check = check_specs(
      unmatched_keys_left = "warn",
      unmatched_keys_right = "warn"
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(combination, combination_print) |>
  summarize(
    mean_square_diff_all = weighted.mean(
      kd_log_diff_all^2,
      1 / prop,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    mean_square_diff_chembl = weighted.mean(
      kd_log_diff_chembl^2,
      1 / prop,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    mean_square_diff_all_unweighted = mean(kd_log_diff_all^2, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_square_diff_chembl_unweighted = mean(kd_log_diff_chembl^2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(mean_square_diff_all)

kd_comparison |>
  group_by(combination, combination_print) |>
  summarize(
    cor_res = cor(kd_log_all, kd_log_pairs, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs"),
    r_squared = cor_res^2,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(r_squared))
```


```{r}
p <- ggplot(
  pair_combinations_overall_mse |>
    mutate(
      across(
        starts_with("combination"),
        \(x) fct_reorder(x, mean_square_diff_all) |>
          fct_rev()
      )
    ),
  aes(
    mean_square_diff_all,
    combination_print
  )
) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    y = NULL,
    x = "Mean squared error log10(Kd)\ntwo doses - all doses"
  ) +
  envalysis::theme_publish()
p

ggsave(
  here("plots", "pair_combinations_overall_mse.pdf"),
  p, width = 4, height = 3.5
)

kd_comparison
```


```{r}
tas_colors <- c(`1` = "#b2182b", `2` = "#ef8a62", `3` = "#fddbc7", `10` = "#2166ac", `no data` = "#ffffff")

p <- ggplot(
  kd_comparison,
  aes(
    kd_all,
    kd_pairs
  )
) +
  geom_hex() +
  geom_abline(
    slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~combination_print,
    axes = "all", axis.labels = "margins"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "plasma",
    trans = "log10"
  ) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::label_number()) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::label_number()) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(
    x = "Kd all doses (nM)",
    y = "Kd two doses (nM)",
    fill = "Count"
  )
p

ggsave(
  here("plots", "pair_kd_vs_all_hex.pdf"),
  p, width = 7, height = 4
)
```


```{r}
model_predict <- function(kd, hill_slope, doses) {
  if (length(kd) > 1 || length(hill_slope) > 1) {
    if (length(kd) != length(hill_slope)) {
      stop("kd and hill_slope must have the same length")
    }
    mapply(
      function(k, h) 100 - 100 / (1 + (k / doses) ^ h),
      kd, hill_slope
    )
  } else {
    100 - 100 / (1 + (kd / doses) ^ hill_slope)
  }
}

plot_fit_impl <- function(kd_samples, hill_slope_samples, doses, responses, dose_range = NULL, pseudo_kd = NULL) {
  # Kd posterior summary
  kd_samples_exp <- exp(kd_samples)
  hill_slope_samples_exp <- exp(hill_slope_samples)
  kd_mean <- median(kd_samples_exp * 1e9, na.rm = TRUE)
  kd_lower_upper <- quantile(kd_samples_exp * 1e9, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)

  dose_min_max <- range(doses)
  if (!is.null(dose_range)) {
    dose_range <- c(min(dose_range[1], dose_min_max[1]), max(dose_range[2], dose_min_max[2]))
  }
  dose_range <- c(min(dose_range[1], kd_lower_upper[1]), max(dose_range[2], kd_lower_upper[2]))

  dose_points <- exp(seq(log(dose_range[1]), log(dose_range[2]), length.out = 100))

  # Compute predicted response matrix for each posterior sample
  pred_matrix <- model_predict(kd_samples_exp, hill_slope_samples_exp, dose_points * 1e-9)

  # Posterior predictive summary across samples
  pred_summary <- tibble(
    dose = dose_points,
    mean = rowMeans(pred_matrix),
    lower = apply(pred_matrix, 1, \(x) quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
    upper = apply(pred_matrix, 1, \(x) quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE))
  )

  # Vertical reference lines
  # vlines <- tibble(
  #   xintercept = c(kd_mean, kd_lower_upper[1], kd_lower_upper[2]),
  #   color = c("Estimated Kd", "Estimated Kd 95% CI", "Estimated Kd 95% CI"),
  #   linetype = c("solid", "dashed", "dashed")
  # )
  kd_df <- tibble(
    kd = kd_mean
  )
  kd_ci_df <- tibble(
    kd_lower = kd_lower_upper[1],
    kd_upper = kd_lower_upper[2]
  )

  p <- ggplot() +
    # 95% credible interval ribbon
    geom_ribbon(
      data = pred_summary,
      aes(x = dose, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      fill = "red", alpha = 0.3
    ) +
    # Posterior predictive mean line
    geom_line(
      data = pred_summary,
      aes(x = dose, y = mean, color = "Posterior Predictive Mean")
    ) +
    # Observed data
    geom_point(
      data = tibble(dose = doses, response = responses),
      aes(x = dose, y = response, color = "Observed Data")
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(
        x = kd_mean, xend = kd_mean
      ),
      data = kd_df,
      y = 100, yend = 110
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(
        x = kd_mean, xend = kd_mean
      ),
      data = kd_df,
      y = -Inf, yend = 100,
      linetype = "dotted"
    ) +
    geom_text(
      aes(
        label = paste0(signif(kd_mean, 2), " nM"),
        x = kd_mean
      ),
      data = kd_df,
      y = 112,
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 0
    ) +
    geom_rect(
      aes(
        xmin = kd_lower, xmax = kd_upper
      ),
      data = kd_ci_df,
      ymin = 100,
      ymax = 110,
      fill = "gray20", alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    # # Kd and pseudo-Kd vertical lines
    # geom_vline(
    #   data = vlines,
    #   aes(xintercept = xintercept, color = color, linetype = linetype)
    # ) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = seq(0, 100, 25),
      minor_breaks = NULL
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = NULL,
      values = c(
        "Observed Data" = "blue",
        "Posterior Predictive Mean" = "red",
        "Estimated Kd" = "black",
        "Estimated Kd 95% CI" = "black",
        "Pseudo Kd" = "blue"
      )
    ) +
    scale_linetype_identity() +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 120)) +
    labs(
      x = "Dose (nM)",
      y = "Percent Control Remaining"
    )

  p
}

extract_posterior <- function(group, compound, target) {
  cmpd_ids <- group$attrs["compound_ids"]
  target_ids <- group$attrs["targets"]
  slice <- cmpd_ids == compound & target_ids == target
  list(
    kd = group["kd"][slice, ],
    hill_slope = group["hill_slope"][slice, ]
  )
}

plot_fit <- function(compound, target) {
  eligible_doses <- c(12.5, 100, 1000, 10000)
  default_dose_range <- range(eligible_doses)
  single_dose_data <- filter(
    single_dose,
    hmsl_id == compound,
    `DiscoveRx Gene Symbol` == target,
    `Compound Concentration (nM)` %in% eligible_doses
  )
  plots <- c(
    list(
      all_pairs = extract_posterior(kd_all_posterior_z["all_eligible_concentrations"], compound, target)
    ),
    map(
      set_names(b$list(kd_pair_posterior_z$keys())),
      \(x) extract_posterior(kd_pair_posterior_z[x], compound, target)
    )
  ) |>
    imap(
      \(posterior, n) {
        if (n == "all_pairs") {
          single_dose_data_subset <- single_dose_data
          name_print <- "All doses"
        } else {
          single_dose_data_subset <- filter(
            single_dose_data,
            `Compound Concentration (nM)` %in% as.numeric(str_split_1(n, fixed("_")))
          )
          name_print <- str_replace(
            n, fixed("_"), " nM + "
          ) |>
            paste0(" nM")
        }
        plot_fit_impl(
          posterior$kd[1, ],
          posterior$hill_slope[1, ],
          single_dose_data_subset$`Compound Concentration (nM)`,
          single_dose_data_subset$`Percent Control`,
          dose_range = default_dose_range
        ) +
          labs(
            title = name_print
          )
      }
    )
  wrap_plots(
    plots,
    guides = "collect"
  )
}

x <- plot_fit("HMSL10285", "AAK1")

extract_posterior(kd_all_posterior_z["all_eligible_concentrations"], "HMSL10285", "AAK1")

py_builtins <- import_builtins()

kd_all_posterior_z$keys()
kd_pair_posterior_z$info
```

nice extrapolation

```{r}
kd_comparison |>
  filter(kd_all < 50, combination == "1000_10000") |>
  arrange(kd_log_diff_all) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  head()

plot_fit("HMSL10393", "DAPK2")
```
